name: Rand Paul
subject: Two things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Your pressure is working as Senators are seeing the light about Obamatrade TPA and changing their positions.

This is a move in the right direction, but you and I cannot sit on the sidelines and hope Congress does the right thing.

I need your help right away, and there isn't a moment to spare.

Today, the Senate will hold a key procedural vote on Obamatrade.

If passed, "fast-track" authority would allow trade deals the Obama administration negotiates with the 12 member nations covered in the Trans-Pacific Partnership to pass Congress with a simple majority vote -- instead of the 67 Senate votes the U.S. Constitution requires for ratification of a Treaty.

So I'm counting on you to call your Senators at **202-224-3121** and urge my colleagues to vote "no" on this Big Government power grab.

**[And after you call your Senators, please agree to stand with me in my fight to defeat the Washington Machine](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595441:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, Congress should NEVER "pass the bill to find out what is in it."

And President Obama has kept the 800 page Trans-Pacific Partnership hidden under lock and key.

Only a handful of members of Congress have bothered to jump through all the hurdles it takes to read this secretive deal.

Obamatrade is Washington at its worst.

So with this crucial vote set for today, I'm asking you to do two things:

1) Call your Senators right away at **202-224-3121** and demand they vote "no" on Obamatrade.

2) Stand with me in the fight to defeat the Washington Machine by making members of Congress read the bills they want to RAM into law.

The tide is turning against the latest Big Government power grab.

But unless your Senators hear from you right away, I'm afraid it might be too late.

Time is running out, so please stand with me by taking action right away.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595442:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595443:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595444:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595445:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595441:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595446:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595447:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28595448:27456694501:m:1:879035888:3A791BC6E005AD09D04ECED64D1A6689:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: One Week
body:
Friend, I know I have asked for your help before, but your help today is critical. | |

---
---
|
Friend,

It is hard to believe it's already been three weeks since I announced my campaign for president. With just one week remaining in June, the hardest work may still be to come.

**Friend, we only have seven days before our first critical End of Quarter Deadline.**

You see, a lot is riding on the numbers we report. My opponents will view it as a sign of the strength our campaign has, and the liberal media will use it as a barometer to measure the support we have.

[**Can I count on you right now, Friend? Will you please chip in $15, $25, $50 or more to help guarantee we are able to post strong numbers?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601135:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)

| [** Donate $5 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601136:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r) | [** Donate $10 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601137:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)
---|---
[** Donate $25 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601138:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r) | [** Donate $50 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601139:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)
[** Donate $75 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601140:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r) | [** Donate $100 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601141:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)
[** Donate $250 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601142:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r) | [** Donate $500 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601143:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)

I know I have asked for your help before, but your help today is critical.

[**Please follow this link to give as generously as you can to our campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601135:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. In order to ensure the strongest fundraising totals possible before the End of Quarter deadline, I need your urgent financial support. [**Will you please chip in as much as you can afford by following this link?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601135:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r) Thank you.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28601135:27461984670:m:1:877327319:B1DC98687D00517D9B8FAB545A504766:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Huma Abedin, Hillary for America
subject: Free for dinner with Hillary?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend --

I’ve watched thousands of people meet Hillary over almost two decades. Some get tongue-tied, some are so excited that they can’t decide what to say first -- but it all falls away when you shake her hand.

There's something inspiring about her presence -- she's so warm and so smart. Sharing a meal with the future President of the United States (knock on wood) is really something you have to experience for yourself.

You're not going to want to miss the chance to meet Hillary -- and to sit down to dinner with her.

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0

Hillary is so excited about this dinner. She's been on the road, meeting voters in cafes and at roundtable events -- but this is the first time she's really going to get to sit down and spend time with the supporters who mean so much to her.

Don't worry about travel and accommodations. We've got that covered for you and your guest. Just add your name today to be automatically entered for the chance to have dinner with Hillary on the campaign trail:

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0

It's going to be a great evening.

Good luck,

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America

*****************
No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/22/15 and 6/25/15. All entries received on 6/25/2015 will count twice. Enter by contributing http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0 or click http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0 to enter without contributing. One Winner and a guest will receive(1) a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0 and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.

PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0

Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

Privacy Policy: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI4OTg2NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMjI0OTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Potential health care crisis in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| King v. Burwell could cause a health care crisis in Florida. Friend -- **UPDATE: Still no plan** The Florida legislature has **no plan** in place if the Supreme Court strikes down provisions of the _Affordable Care Act_. **They have no plan for the 1.3 million Floridians who are at risk of losing their federal health insurance subsidies.** It's time for the Florida legislature to step up and make a plan to address this potential healthcare crisis in Florida. The Supreme Court could release a decision any day -- and that's why the Florida legislature needs to take action immediately. [**Add your name: Urge the Florida legislature to make a plan for the millions of Florida's children and families who could be affected by the Supreme Court's decision.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27a1/738133e4/3974163d/7f9d6c04/1594619411/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/plan") I hope that the Supreme Court does the right thing. But Florida's families can't rely on hope alone -- they need a plan. Thank you for taking action, Patrick Murphy | **[TAKE ACTION »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27a1/738133e4/3974163d/7f9d6c04/1594619411/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/plan")**
---

name: Barry Bennett, BenCarson.com
subject: Join Ben & Candy for a special day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28606177:27470762357:m:1:876315805:45F2378393F3C0B86C8BC9BA8AC0437B:r)
---
|

Peter,

On Monday, July 6, Ben and Candy Carson will celebrate their 40th Wedding Anniversary.

They will be campaigning in New Hampshire that day so we have decided to throw them a party and we hope you can come as our special guest.

One lucky supporter and a friend will be chosen to fly to New Hampshire and join us.
[**To be automatically entered into our contest, just donate $5 or**** more****.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28606177:27470762357:m:1:876315805:45F2378393F3C0B86C8BC9BA8AC0437B:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28606177:27470762357:m:1:876315805:45F2378393F3C0B86C8BC9BA8AC0437B:r)
---
As the Carsons have traveled around the country during this campaign, they have met some remarkable people.

Contests like this are great opportunities to spend more time with you, while also helping our campaign to raise the money necessary to be successful, and so we hope that you'll consider entering today.

Because July 6 is just around the corner, this contest will end on June 30.

**[So if you and a guest would like the opportunity to join Ben and Candy in New Hampshire for their 40th Anniversary Celebration, please donate $5 or more now to be automatically entered.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28606177:27470762357:m:1:876315805:45F2378393F3C0B86C8BC9BA8AC0437B:r)

**Thank you for your continued support, and hopefully we'll get to see you in New Hampshire.

Sincerely,
Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS CONTEST** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this contest. You may enter contest without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28606178:27470762357:m:1:876315805:45F2378393F3C0B86C8BC9BA8AC0437B:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "40th ANNIVERSARY CELEBRATION" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28606179:27470762357:m:1:876315805:45F2378393F3C0B86C8BC9BA8AC0437B:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to New Hampshire, transportation, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This contest is sponsored by Carson America. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Republican "family values"
body:
#
Dear Friend -
When my Republican colleagues talk about "family values," what they usually mean is opposition to a woman's right to choose, opposition to contraception, opposition to gay rights, and support for abstinence-only education.
Let me give a somewhat different perspective on family values.
When a mother has a baby and is unable to spend time with that child during the first weeks and months of his or her life, **that is not a family value.**
When a wife is diagnosed with cancer and a husband cannot get time off of work to take care of her, **that is not a family value.**
When a mother is forced to send her sick child to school because she cannot afford to stay home with her, **that is not a family value.**
When a husband, wife, and kids, during the course of an entire year, are unable to spend any time together on vacation, **that is not a family value.**
**The Republican agenda for families is really an attack on everything that a family is supposed to stand for.**
When it comes to basic workplace protections and family benefits, workers in every other major industrialized country in the world get a better deal than workers in the United States. That should be an embarrassment to anyone who wants to talk seriously about family values in this country.
I'm running for president because I will stand for real family values. [**Please contribute $5 to our campaign now to help make paid family leave, sick days, and vacation days a reality for every working person in America.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21fd/43f17890/5f2165f3/621da76c/1821648283/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/family-values?refcode=em150623a")
It is not enough, though, to simply oppose the Republican agenda. That's why I'm proud to tell you what I think is a true agenda for family values.
Every worker in America should be guaranteed at least 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave. **That is a family value.**
It is insane that low wage workers in McDonald's who get sick are forced to work because they cannot afford to miss work. Workers in this country must have paid sick time so they don't get coworkers or customers sick on the job. **That is a family value.**
Every person who works for a living must have at least 10 days of paid vacation. Making sure families can afford to take some time off, without having to worry about going broke -- **that is a family value.**
Let's be clear: in terms of protecting the needs of our families, in many respects, the United States lags behind virtually every major country on earth.
**Last place is no place for America.** It is time to join the rest of the industrialized world by showing the people of this country that we are not just a nation that talks about family values -- but that we are a nation that is prepared to live up to these ideals by making sure that workers in this country have access to paid family leave, paid sick time and paid vacations.
[**Can you help me carry this message in our campaign? Please contribute $5 now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21fd/43f17890/5f2165f3/621da76c/1821648283/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/family-values?refcode=em150623a")
Thank you for all of your support,
\- Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21fd/43f17890/5f2165f3/621da76d/1821648283/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/family-values?refcode=emb150623a")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21fd/43f17890/5f2165f3/621da76a/1821648283/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21fd/43f17890/5f2165f3/621da76b/1821648283/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
